pathAssistantSteps.info:
The translation has been completed by WordClass and now requires CRM validation.


CRM actions:

  • If the document is correct → click “Confirm Proofreading” to close the request.
  • If edits are needed → upload the corrected file in Salesforce and then click “Confirm Proofreading” to close the request.

Notes:

  • Monthly Comments: Validation pushes the Monthly Comments data into the databases and triggers Yoda Factsheet generation.
  • Translation & Publication: Closing the request automatically notifies the publication team for the next steps.

The content is currently being translated through WordClass.


Translation can follow one of three modes:

  • AI only: automatic translation with no human review.
  • Post-editing: AI translation reviewed by a linguist.
  • Full human: translation fully done by a professional linguist.


Once the translation is completed, you will receive a notification in Salesforce to proofread and validate the document.
